title: X Article From Daily Post
summary: Turn an approved daily post into a draft-only, bookmark-optimized X Article packet with thumbnail brief, scorecard, manual review gate, and receipt. Live X execution is not part of public v0.

instructions: Return the source post, article brief, draft article, thumbnail brief, thumbnail prompt, and scorecard.
Mark live X execution as unavailable in public v0.
Do not claim the article or thumbnail was published, scheduled, uploaded, or submitted.
Keep the packet draft-only until the user gives a separate explicit publish or schedule approval in a supported product surface.
